name: Phase 10 No-code tenant customization requirements matrix

rows.requirement: TenantConfiguration root, versions, and publish lifecycle
evidence: P10 contract defines the TenantConfiguration root/version lifecycle and exit criteria before implementation.
rows.cleanup: Pending implementation. Phase 10 deterministic reset must prove config-version cleanup/readback before verification.
rows.blocker: Blocked until P10-001 implementation adds TenantConfiguration version lifecycle domain code, tests, runtime readback, and E2E-090/E2E-095 evidence.

rows.requirement: Role/label/stage builder and runtime label projection
evidence: P10 contract defines label/role/stage builder scope and runtime projection requirements before implementation.
tests: pending: npm test -- packages/tenant-config apps/api/src/*phase10*.test.ts apps/web/src
rows.cleanup: Pending implementation. Phase 10 reset must restore label-set versions and runtime projections before verification.
rows.blocker: Blocked until P10-002 implementation adds label builder API/UI/domain behavior and E2E-090 proves runtime labels after reload with permission/audit evidence.

evidence: P10 contract defines process template builder MVP and active-runtime stability boundaries before implementation.
tests: pending: npm test -- packages/tenant-config packages/project-core apps/api/src/*phase10*.test.ts apps/web/src
rows.cleanup: Pending implementation. Phase 10 reset must restore process-template draft/active versions before verification.
rows.blocker: Blocked until P10-003 implementation adds safe process-template builder behavior and E2E-090/E2E-095 prove future-template effect plus existing-runtime stability.

rows.requirement: Custom field builder and control-surface binding
evidence: P10 contract defines custom field builder, validation, runtime value, and control-surface binding before implementation.
tests: pending: npm test -- packages/tenant-config packages/project-core packages/control-surfaces apps/api/src/*phase10*.test.ts apps/web/src
rows.cleanup: Pending implementation. Phase 10 reset must restore custom field definitions, values, and control-surface projections before verification.
rows.blocker: Blocked until P10-004 implementation adds custom-field domain/API/UI behavior and E2E-091 proves field use in a control surface with readback/reload/cleanup.

rows.requirement: KPI threshold builder and future evaluation impact
evidence: P10 contract defines KPI threshold builder and historical evaluation stability requirements before implementation.
tests: pending: npm test -- packages/tenant-config packages/kpi-engine apps/api/src/*phase10*.test.ts apps/web/src
rows.cleanup: Pending implementation. Phase 10 reset must restore KPI threshold versions and evaluation projections before verification.
rows.blocker: Blocked until P10-005 implementation adds threshold builder preview/publish behavior and E2E-092/E2E-094 prove future evaluation impact and invalid config rejection.

rows.requirement: Saved views and control-surface layout builder MVP
evidence: P10 contract defines saved view and control-surface layout builder MVP before implementation.
tests: pending: npm test -- packages/tenant-config packages/control-surfaces apps/api/src/*phase10*.test.ts apps/web/src
rows.cleanup: Pending implementation. Phase 10 reset must restore saved-view/layout versions and target control-surface read models before verification.
rows.blocker: Blocked until P10-006 implementation adds saved-view/layout builder behavior and E2E-093 proves publish, reload, permission-aware readback, and cleanup.

evidence: P10 contract defines action enable/disable and safe form configuration boundaries before implementation.
tests: pending: npm test -- packages/tenant-config packages/action-engine packages/control-surfaces apps/api/src/*phase10*.test.ts apps/web/src
rows.cleanup: Pending implementation. Phase 10 reset must restore action configuration versions and action availability projections before verification.
rows.blocker: Blocked until P10-007 implementation adds action-configuration behavior and E2E-093/E2E-094/E2E-095 prove layout/action effects, validation, backend denial, and runtime stability.

rows.requirement: Configuration validation, admin preview, export/import, permissions, and audit API
evidence: P10 contract defines preview/validate/publish/export/import APIs, permission checks, and audit requirements before implementation.
tests: pending: npm test -- packages/tenant-config apps/api/src/*phase10*.test.ts apps/web/src
rows.cleanup: Pending implementation. Phase 10 reset must restore preview tokens, import previews, configuration versions, and audit/action evidence before verification.
rows.blocker: Blocked until P10-008 implementation adds validation/preview/publish/export/import API/UI support and E2E-090..095 prove permission, audit, readback, reload, and cleanup.

evidence: P10 contract defines deterministic fixture and executable E2E requirements before implementation.
rows.cleanup: Pending implementation. E2E-090..095 must each prove reset/readback for configuration changes before verification.
rows.blocker: Blocked until P10-009 implementation adds deterministic Phase 10 fixtures and executable, non-skipped Playwright E2E-090..095 with cleanup/readback evidence.

rows.requirement: Phase 10 verification matrix and exit gate
evidence: P10 contract and verifier support define the final Phase 10 strict exit gate before implementation.
rows.cleanup: Pending implementation. Strict P10 phase exit requires E2E-090..095 cleanup/reset evidence before verification.
rows.blocker: P10 phase exit cannot be verified until P10-001..P10-009 are implemented and E2E-090..095 pass with structured evidence.
